description: §18.0.2 — an exhaustive block-`<match>` whose arm bodies contain NO `<onTransition>` element SHALL NOT fire E-MATCH-ONTRANSITION-FORBIDDEN (nor E-MATCH-EFFECT-FORBIDDEN). Acceptance sibling of e-match-ontransition-forbidden-pos: display-only arm bodies compile clean.
rationale: §18.0.2: a `<match>` arm body with only display markup carries no transition handler, so the engine-only `<onTransition>` check is correctly silent.
